Registry / Terms / electronic subassembly

electronic subassembly

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00226 · 3 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

3 distinct definitions across 3 publications.

3 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20101997OIML R 106-1:1997T.2.2.101265
a part of an electronic device comprised of electronic components and having a recognizable function of its own
pending
20101993OIML R 105:1993T.1401229
a part of an electronic device employing electronic components that has a recognizable function of its own
pending
20102004OIML D 11:20043.300226
part of an electronic device, employing electronic components OIML B 3 [2] contains the following and having a recognizable function of its own. Examples: amplifiers, comparators, power converters
pending
